[Skip to content](https://www.helix.com/#mainContent)

# The enterprise genomics platform

Helix transforms health systems and enables life science organizations to leverage the power of genomics across their enterprise, creating strategic value and fueling future growth.

![Globe](https://www.helix.com/_next/image?url=%2Fglobe%2Fglobe-dots.avif&w=3840&q=75)

### Helix Research Network

Accelerate genomic discoveries and drive real-world clinical impact. Leverage collective genomic intelligence to advance precision medicine, enhance patient care, and lead in healthcare innovation.

[Learn More\\
\\
Learn More](https://www.helix.com/what-we-do/helix-research-network)

### Helix Precision Pathway

Utilize Helix's advanced genomic insights to enhance clinical decision-making and improve patient outcomes. Empower your healthcare organization to deliver personalized care at scale.

[Learn More\\
\\
Learn More](https://www.helix.com/what-we-do/helix-precision-pathway)

### Helix Clinical Genomics

Unlock comprehensive genomic insights with Helix diagnostics. Simplify genetic testing for your patients while gaining actionable health information.

[Learn More\\
\\
Learn More](https://www.helix.com/clinical-genomics)

### Helix Genomic Advantage

Harness Genomic Advantage to shift the cost curve and drive growth for health plans. Reduce healthcare spend while improving member outcomes.

[Learn More\\
\\
Learn More](https://www.helix.com/what-we-do/helix-genomic-advantage)

### Helix GenoSphere

Access curated, longitudinal clinico-genomic cohorts to enhance drug discovery, streamline clinical trials, and drive innovation in precision medicine.

[Learn More\\
\\
Learn More](https://www.helix.com/what-we-do/helix-genosphere)

## Driving collaboration and partnership across industries

Health systems

Providers

Life sciences

Payers

Over 1.5 million

diverse patients committed across 15+ HRN members

[Empowering health systems with genomic solutions for precision care](https://www.helix.com/who-we-serve/health-systems-and-provider-groups)

![Transforming healthcare delivery and planning with genetic insights, empowering health systems to enhance patient outcomes and drive population health initiatives.](https://www.helix.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.sanity.io%2Fimages%2Fg5irbagy%2Fproduction%2F75105485a18c3de73df05bc1a4e8c622c4fca2ab-1920x1080.png&w=3840&q=75)

### Transforming healthcare delivery and planning with genetic insights, empowering health systems to enhance patient outcomes and drive population health initiatives.

## Empowering precision health at an enterprise scale

Helix integrates genomics into everyday healthcare, enabling organizations to implement precision medicine effectively. We transform genetic insights into practical health strategies, improving patient care while optimizing operational efficiency and expanding clinical capabilities.

[**Accelerate strategic growth** \\
\\
Our solutions enable the expansion of precision medicine capabilities, driving patient engagement, improving health outcomes, and creating new revenue streams through innovative genomic offerings.](https://www.helix.com/what-we-solve/enable-strategic-growth) [**Diversify revenue streams** \\
\\
Expand beyond genetic testing to offer personalized health programs, targeted screenings, and data-driven services, creating ongoing patient engagement and value-based care opportunities.](https://www.helix.com/what-we-solve/diversify-revenue-streams) [**Managing total cost of care** \\
\\
Transform healthcare economics through genomic intelligence. Identify high-risk populations and enable targeted interventions, reducing unnecessary treatments while improving outcomes.](https://www.helix.com/what-we-solve/managing-total-cost-of-care)

## A selection of our partners

[![Partner logo](https://cdn.sanity.io/images/g5irbagy/production/19d6e45dd85d5e8b25897bc2bcc51384167332a6-1100x300.svg)](https://www.helix.com/press-releases/helix-and-cone-health-launch-population-genomics-initiative)

## Partner perspectives

HealthPartners has launched myGenetics, a population genomics program that will provide important health information to families across Minnesota and surrounding states.

For more information about our partners, see: [partner page](https://www.helix.com/health-systems/population-genomics-partners) or [resource center](https://www.helix.com/resources)

We empower health systems, payers, and pharma with cutting-edge precision medicine tools, optimizing patient care and driving innovation in personalized health. Discover how our AI-powered genomic analysis can transform your approach to population health and drug discovery.

web.markdown:
# AI-enabled   precision medicine

How can I help you?

![image description](https://www.tempus.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/tempus.webp)

## With the power of AI, we now have the ability to

- ##### ACCELERATE


the discovery of novel targets

- ##### PREDICT


the effectiveness of treatments

- ##### IDENTIFY


potentially life-saving clinical trials

- ##### DIAGNOSE


multiple diseases earlier


## Discover our innovative technology

- [**ONE** AI-enabled assistant for healthcare providers and researchers](https://www.tempus.com/#)
- [**NEXT** Identify and close gaps in care](https://www.tempus.com/#)
- [**LENS** Find, access, and analyze multimodal real-world data](https://www.tempus.com/#)
- [**ALGOS** Algorithmic models connected to our assays to provide additional insight](https://www.tempus.com/#)

[Explore our tech & AI](https://www.tempus.com/about-us/tempus-tech/)

[ONE](https://www.tempus.com/#)

AI-enabled assistant for healthcare providers and researchers

![image description](https://www.tempus.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/Tempus-AI_One.jpg)

[NEXT](https://www.tempus.com/#)

Identify and close gaps in care

![image description](https://www.tempus.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/Tempus-AI_Next.jpg)

[LENS](https://www.tempus.com/#)

Find, access, and analyze multimodal real-world data

![image description](https://www.tempus.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/Tempus-AI_Lens.jpg)

[ALGOS](https://www.tempus.com/#)

Algorithmic models connected to our assays to provide additional insight

![image description](https://www.tempus.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/Tempus-AI_Algos.jpg)

[Explore our tech & AI](https://www.tempus.com/about-us/tempus-tech/)

Your browser does not support the video tag.


[WATCH OUR STORY](https://www.tempus.com/#watch-our-story)

[Close Popup](https://www.tempus.com/#)
Your browser does not support the video tag.


### Explore Tempus

- [PROVIDERS](https://www.tempus.com/#)
- [LIFE SCIENCES](https://www.tempus.com/#)
- [PATIENTS](https://www.tempus.com/#)

PROVIDERS

We can help physicians make more informed treatment decisions.

[Learn More](https://www.tempus.com/providers/)

Your browser does not support the video tag.


LIFE SCIENCES

We can assist pharmaceutical and biotech companies with better drug development.

[Learn More](https://www.tempus.com/life-sciences/)

Your browser does not support the video tag.


PATIENTS

We can help patients find their own unique and optimal therapy options.

[Learn More](https://www.tempus.com/patients/)

Your browser does not support the video tag.


## Our Science

Through our scientific publications and research projects, we are accelerating and transforming personalized patient care.

[View All Publications](https://www.tempus.com/publications/)

[![](https://www.tempus.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/09/Logo-3.png)Nature Biotechnology Study Reveals that Tempus’ xT Platform Increases Cancer Patients’ Personalized Therapeutic OpportunitiesExtensive molecular profiling combined with clinical data identifies targeted therapies and clinical trials for a large proportion of cancer patients, and paired tumor/normal plus transcriptome sequencing outperforms tumor-only DNA panel testing.](https://www.tempus.com/news/pr/nature-biotechnology-study-reveals-that-tempus-xt-platform-increases-cancer-patients-personalized-therapeutic-opportunities/) [![](https://www.tempus.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/11/logo_cellreportswhite.png)A Pan-cancer Organoid Platform for Precision MedicineShowcasing a robust pan-cancer tumor organoid (TO) platform, revealing genomic/transcriptome fidelity of TO culture from >1,000 patients. We demonstrate a neural-network-based high-throughput approach for label-free, light-microscopy-based drug assays capable of predicting patient-specific heterogeneity in drug responses with applicability across solid cancers.](https://www.tempus.com/resources/publications/a-pan-cancer-organoid-platform-for-precision-medicine/) [![](https://www.tempus.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/11/logo_npj-precision-oncologywhite.png)Validation of a Liquid Biopsy Assay with Molecular and Clinical Profiling of Circulating Tumor DNAActionable variants would have been missed if only solid tumor or liquid biopsy tests were performed. Thus, we believe that liquid biopsies provide value to patients when used in combination with standard tissue genotyping.](https://www.tempus.com/resources/publications/validation-of-a-liquid-biopsy-assay-with-molecular-and-clinical-profiling-of-circulating-tumor-dna/)

### Improving patient care through high quality testing, clinical trial matching, and deep research data that powers scientific discovery

~65% **of all Academic Medical Centers in the US are connected to Tempus**

50%+ **of oncologists in the US connected to Tempus through sequencing, clinical trial matching, and research-enabled partnerships**

95% **of the top 20 pharma oncology companies partner with Tempus**

250+ **biopharma partnerships**

40,000,000+ **de-identified research records to power scientific discovery to improve patient outcomes**

40,000+ **patients have been identified for potential enrollment into clinical trials in our network**

350+ **petabytes of data**

### Tempus Selected by ARPA-H to Provide CRO and Testing Services for the ADAPT Program, Advancing Precision Cancer Therapy

Tempus has been selected by ARPA-H to provide testing and contract research organization (CRO) services in support of the agency’s ADAPT program, which aims to develop adaptive strategies that leverage biomarkers to target metastatic disease.

[READ PRESS RELEASE](https://www.tempus.com/news/tempus-selected-by-arpa-h-to-provide-cro-and-testing-services-for-the-adapt-program-advancing-precision-cancer-therapy/)

### Tempus Receives U.S. FDA 510(k) Clearance for Tempus xR IVD, its RNA NGS In Vitro Diagnostic Device

Tempus has received 510(k) clearance from the FDA for its RNA-based Tempus xR IVD device. xR IVD is available as a life sciences tool to support drug development programs.

[READ PRESS RELEASE](https://www.tempus.com/news/tempus-receives-u-s-fda-510k-clearance-for-tempus-xr-ivd-its-rna-ngs-in-vitro-diagnostic-device/)

### Tempus Releases New Research Validating PurIST® Algorithm for Enhanced Therapy Selection in Pancreatic Cancer

A new study published in JCO Precision Oncology validates the clinical utility of the company’s PurIST® algorithmic diagnostic. The study provides the largest real-world evidence to date supporting the integration of PurIST into routine clinical care for patients with advanced PDAC, with the aim of informing first-line chemotherapy selection and improving patient outcomes.

[READ PRESS RELEASE](https://www.tempus.com/news/tempus-announces-new-study-in-jco-precision-oncology-validating-purist-algorithm-for-enhanced-therapy-selection-in-pancreatic-cancer/)

[Close Popup](https://www.tempus.com/#)
Your browser does not support the video tag.


## This is AI-enabled precision medicine

This is the future of healthcare.

Thank you for contacting Tempus. We will respond shortly.

web.markdown:
Skip to Content

- Medical Innovation


# Mayo Clinic Platform\_Accelerate welcomes new cohort of healthcare technology startups






By



Caroline Auger





March 5, 2026


##### Share this:

[![Share to facebook](https://www.mayoclinic.org/~/media/43B7ECA38E0649F9B69B9E20B615EBF0.png)](https://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fnewsnetwork.mayoclinic.org%2Fdiscussion%2Fmayo-clinic-platform_accelerate-welcomes-new-cohort-of-healthcare-technology-startups%2F)[![Share to twitter](https://newsnetwork.mayoclinic.org/wp-content/themes/velocity/Public/images/social/dark-circles/x_logo_black_bg.png)](https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?url=https%3A%2F%2Fnewsnetwork.mayoclinic.org%2Fdiscussion%2Fmayo-clinic-platform_accelerate-welcomes-new-cohort-of-healthcare-technology-startups%2F)[![Share to linkedin](https://www.mayoclinic.org/~/media/EBB1FF24DF864C038CFBEEE2B1A57158.png)](https://www.linkedin.com/shareArticle?mini=true&url=https%3A%2F%2Fnewsnetwork.mayoclinic.org%2Fdiscussion%2Fmayo-clinic-platform_accelerate-welcomes-new-cohort-of-healthcare-technology-startups%2F)[![Share to email](https://www.mayoclinic.org/~/media/5E0C5DEBF8F845A181C7FEAFE511007D.png)](mailto:?subject=Mayo%20Clinic%20Platform_Accelerate%20welcomes%20new%20cohort%20of%20healthcare%20technology%20startups%20-%20Mayo%20Clinic%20News%20Network&body=Article:%20https%3A%2F%2Fnewsnetwork.mayoclinic.org%2Fdiscussion%2Fmayo-clinic-platform_accelerate-welcomes-new-cohort-of-healthcare-technology-startups%2F)![Print](https://www.mayoclinic.org/~/media/2AF478534102412F97A2D46B3A1D1547.png)

![Colleagues reviewing screen](https://newsnetwork.mayoclinic.org/n7-mcnn/7bcc9724adf7b803/uploads/2026/03/Colleagues-reviewing-screen_GettyImages-2166422854-1024x682.jpg)Getty Images

ROCHESTER, Minn. — [Mayo Clinic Platform\_Accelerate](https://www.mayoclinicplatform.org/accelerate/) has announced its latest cohort, welcoming 18 national and international healthcare technology companies that are creating cutting-edge digital solutions to advance health innovation.

Through the Accelerate program, these companies will participate in an immersive, 30-week program that offers access to expert mentors, industry-leading technologies and millions of de-identified, longitudinal clinical records to develop and validate artificial intelligence (AI)-driven healthcare solutions.

"The future of healthcare depends on clinical insight and technology advancing together," says [John Halamka, M.D.](https://www.mayoclinicplatform.org/about/team/john-d-halamka-m-d-m-s/), Dwight and Dian Diercks President of [Mayo Clinic Platform](https://www.mayoclinicplatform.org/). "Accelerate brings entrepreneurs together with Mayo Clinic clinicians and other leading experts to turn bold ideas into practical solutions that can truly improve how care is delivered. It's one more way we're responsibly advancing AI to benefit patients around the world."

[The 18 companies](https://www.mayoclinicplatform.org/focus-areas/digital-health/accelerate/accelerate-cohort-landing-page/) participating in the new cohort are working to address complex healthcare challenges. The cohort includes:

- **100ms** builds AI agents that automate patient access workflows for specialty practices, including gastroenterology, allergy/immunology and neurology.
- **NousLogic Telehealth** provides WFH: Wellness from Home, a remote elderly patient monitoring platform that tracks vital signs and real-time medication adherence, including AI-based medication dispensing.
- **MyBackHub** is an AI-powered digital health platform that delivers personalized, nonoperative back pain care using AI to triage patients and guide treatment and care coordination.
- **Cura AI** builds a patient context graph that unifies fragmented patient data into a portable, patient-owned record, enabling conversational AI to support early-risk detection and preventive care.
- **SPRYT** developsAsa, an AI medical receptionist that empowers patients to book, change and pay for medical appointments via text or instant messaging in their preferred language.
- **NeoCure Inc.** is developing an AI solution that analyzes bedside vital data to enable timely, specialist-free detection of an eye disease affecting preterm infants.
- **Xcoo** provides Chrovis, an AI-powered service that supports genomic cancer diagnosis and treatment decisions with clinician-ready insights and patient-friendly reports.
- **YOBO Health** offers a care coordination platform designed to help prevent hospital readmissions among patients with cardio-renal-metabolic conditions.
- **Canary Applied Intelligence** delivers a patient-centric AI platform for cardio-renal care that identifies high-risk patients early and enables proactive, data-driven interventions across the care journey.
- **Curenetics** is a U.K.-based AI-driven health technology company that predicts individual patient response to cancer immunotherapy by integrating clinical, genomic and imaging data.
- **Bluevia Health** is an applied AI platform that analyzes multimodal clinical data to detect postoperative deterioration earlier, helping health systems identify complications sooner and improve surgical outcomes.
- **Precision Imaging Inc.** is a Tokyo-based medtech startup specializing in AI-powered intraoperative navigation that uses computer vision to deliver cost-effective, high-precision guidance for orthopedic surgery, starting with total hip arthroplasty.
- **Avedian** provides the Compass Decision Support platform, delivering operational insights that help health systems improve efficiency, performance and capacity planning.
- **Hoopcare** reduces surgical risk and improves operating room efficiency by automating preoperative evaluation and predicting postoperative complications with AI.
- **Hera** is an AI-powered male fertility platform that combines testing with predictive analytics to deliver personalized sperm health insights for patients, clinics and fertility programs.
- **EW2Health** is a digital health platform that uses predictive behavioral analytics to support GLP-1–based obesity care by forecasting weight trends and enabling proactive, personalized interventions to improve adherence and long-term metabolic health.
- **Ecotone AI** applies frontier AI and full-genome analysis to uncover disease-driving genetic mechanisms and accelerate precision therapies for rare diseases at scale.
- **OneMedic** is a Vietnam-based health tech company using an AI-driven ecosystem to enable early detection and proactive management of chronic disease through integrated, patient-centered care in a primary care setting.

"The innovation we're seeing in this February cohort is a testament to the accelerating pace of AI in medicine," says Jamie Sundsbak, director of the Accelerate program. "We are proud to support these 18 companies as they transition from revolutionary concepts to scalable solutions that can help define the next decade of healthcare."

The Accelerate program offers multiple ways to participate through a 30-week immersive program or a multiyear engagement pathway.

To learn more about the program or to apply for an upcoming cohort, visit [Mayo Clinic Platform\_Accelerate](https://www.mayoclinicplatform.org/focus-areas/digital-health/accelerate/).

###

**About Mayo Clinic Platform**

Founded on Mayo Clinic's dedication to patient-centered care, Mayo Clinic Platform enables new knowledge, new solutions and new technologies through collaborations with health technology innovators to create a healthier world. To learn more, visit [Mayo Clinic Platform](https://www.mayoclinicplatform.org/).

**About Mayo Clinic**

[Mayo Clinic](https://www.mayoclinic.org/about-mayo-clinic) is a nonprofit organization committed to innovation in clinical practice, education and research, and providing compassion, expertise and answers to everyone who needs healing. Visit the [Mayo Clinic News Network](https://newsnetwork.mayoclinic.org/) for additional Mayo Clinic news.

**Media contact:**

- Caroline Auger, Mayo Clinic Communications, [newsbureau@mayo.edu](mailto:newsbureau@mayo.edu)

- [(VIDEO) Transforming colon cancer care through precision medicine](https://newsnetwork.mayoclinic.org/discussion/video-transforming-colon-cancer-care-through-precision-medicine/)







[Mayo Clinic Q&A: Treating colorectal cancer with surgery](https://newsnetwork.mayoclinic.org/discussion/mayo-clinic-qa-treating-colorectal-cancer-with-surgery/)


## Related Articles

web.title: MyOme and Ms.Medicine Announce Strategic Partnership ...
web.description: "By integrating MyOme's comprehensive genomic testing through Nest's platform, our clinicians can bring precision medicine into routine visits — ...
web.markdown:
[Accessibility Statement](https://www.cision.com/about/accessibility/) [Skip Navigation](https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/myome-and-msmedicine-announce-strategic-partnership-to-redefine-personalized-primary-care-through-genomics-302631449.html#main)

[![MyOme, a clinical whole genome sequencing and analysis platform company (PRNewsfoto/MyOme, Inc)](https://mma.prnewswire.com/media/1829079/MyOme_Logo.jpg?w=400)](https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/myome-and-msmedicine-announce-strategic-partnership-to-redefine-personalized-primary-care-through-genomics-302631449.html#)

MyOme, a clinical whole genome sequencing and analysis platform company (PRNewsfoto/MyOme, Inc)


[![Ms.Medicine Logo (PRNewsfoto/MyOme, Inc)](https://mma.prnewswire.com/media/2816157/Ms__Medicinelogo_Logo.jpg?w=400)](https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/myome-and-msmedicine-announce-strategic-partnership-to-redefine-personalized-primary-care-through-genomics-302631449.html#)

Ms.Medicine Logo (PRNewsfoto/MyOme, Inc)


MENLO PARK, Calif. and CINCINNATI, Dec. 3, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- MyOme, a leading clinical whole-genome testing and polygenic risk modelling (PRS) company, today announced a strategic partnership with Ms.Medicine, a national network of women's health and concierge primary care practices. Together, the organizations are pioneering a new model for primary care —one where comprehensive, proactive genomic insights are seamlessly integrated into everyday patient care.

Through this collaboration, Ms.Medicine patients will gain access to MyOme's Proactive Health portfolio, a comprehensive genomics solution that combines monogenic disease screening, pharmacogenomic insights, and integrated polygenic risk scores. These insights empower clinicians to identify risks early, tailor prevention and treatment strategies, and personalize care throughout a woman's life.

For example, a woman with a family history of breast cancer can now undergo genomic testing as part of her routine annual visit. Her provider can use MyOme's integrated report to assess both rare (monogenic) and common (polygenic) genetic risks, determine whether enhanced screening is warranted, and use pharmacogenomic data to guide preventive medication choices — all within the same clinical workflow.

"This collaboration brings genomics into routine primary care where it can have the greatest impact," said Premal Shah, PhD, Chief Executive Officer of MyOme. "Embedding MyOme's genomic insights in Ms.Medicine's existing workflow lets clinicians identify risk earlier and drive patients into standard-of-care interventions at the right time — when disease can be avoided, delayed, or caught early and treated with lower costs and less-intensive interventions."

For Ms.Medicine, the partnership represents a natural extension of its mission to close the gender gap in healthcare delivery and research. "Our mission has always been to elevate the standard-of-care by making it individualized, evidence-based, and proactive," said Lisa Larkin, MD, FACP, MSCP, IF, Chief Executive Officer of Ms.Medicine. "By integrating MyOme's comprehensive genomic testing through Nest's platform, our clinicians can bring precision medicine into routine visits — helping women understand their health risks sooner and take informed action to prevent disease."

MyOme tests are available through an existing partnership with Nest Genomics, a clinical decision-support platform that integrates genomic insights directly into the EHR so clinicians can seamlessly order genetic testing, interpret and act on genetic data at the point of care — transforming genomic complexity into actionable, everyday medicine.

The partnership will serve as a blueprint for how genomics-informed care can be operationalized across primary care and women's health programs nationwide — bringing whole-genome sequencing, disease risk assessment, and pharmacogenomics together in a single, actionable model for prevention and lifelong health.

**About MyOme, Inc.**

MyOme, Inc. is a clinical genomics company dedicated to helping individuals and health systems understand and act on their genetic risks. Using whole-genome sequencing and advanced analytics, MyOme delivers actionable reports that integrate single-gene variants, pharmacogenomic data, and polygenic risk scores to guide prevention, treatment, and long-term health planning.

Learn more at [www.myome.com](https://edge.prnewswire.com/c/link/?t=0&l=en&o=4571199-1&h=3187304111&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.myome.com%2F&a=www.myome.com).

**About Ms.Medicine**

Ms.Medicine is a national network of concierge women's health practices that provide evidence-based, gender-specific, and personalized primary care. Founded to close the gender gap in healthcare delivery and research, Ms.Medicine empowers physicians to deliver comprehensive, unhurried, and patient-centered care.

Learn more at [www.msmedicine.com](https://edge.prnewswire.com/c/link/?t=0&l=en&o=4571199-1&h=3614792120&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.msmedicine.com%2F&a=www.msmedicine.com).

SOURCE MyOme, Inc

![](https://rt.prnewswire.com/rt.gif?NewsItemId=LA37899&Transmission_Id=202512030700PR_NEWS_USPR_____LA37899&DateId=20251203)

\\
